summary: Iteration 3 verified end-to-end: P0 case-insensitive email fix, full password-reset flow (forgot/reset/change), welcome email console fallback, and frontend pages. 43 backend tests pass + 1 skip (unrelated /openapi.json ingress quirk from iter2). 8/8 frontend Playwright checks pass for all new pages and navigation entry points.
critical_code_review_comments: Case-insensitive email is implemented consistently: _normalize_email() is invoked on register, login, and get_user_by_email — verified by registering 'Mario.Rossi.xxx@Example.COM' and logging in with .lower(), .upper(), and the original casing, all resolving to the lowercased account.

auth/register no longer crashes when auto-login fails: routes/auth.py:106-113 returns a clear 500 ('Registration succeeded but auto-login failed. Please log in manually.') instead of dereferencing None — code path inspected and the underlying NoneType crash is closed.
Forgot-password is correctly enumeration-safe: identical 200 body returned for existing AND nonexistent emails (verified by byte-comparison of both responses).
Reset token is single-use via stored jti on the user doc: second reset with the same token returns 400 'Reset link has already been used or is no longer valid' — verified.
Tampered/invalid token cleanly returns 400 'Invalid or expired reset link' via decode_password_reset_token() returning None.
Password length validation (>=8) enforced in auth_service.reset_password_with_token AND change_password — both return 400 with 'Password must be at least 8 characters'.
change-password requires a Bearer token (FastAPI Depends(get_current_user) -> 401/403 when missing) and rejects a wrong current_password with 400 'Current password is incorrect'.

Welcome email and password-reset email both fall back to a clearly delimited '========== EMAIL (console fallback) ==========' block in backend stderr when RESEND_API_KEY is empty — token extraction from logs works reliably (8s wait window).
Welcome email is dispatched best-effort post-register; failure does NOT block registration (try/except around send_welcome).

Frontend: all required data-testids are present (forgot-password-form / forgot-email-input / forgot-submit-btn / forgot-password-success, reset-password-form / reset-new-password / reset-confirm-password / reset-submit-btn / reset-no-token, change-password-form / change-current / change-new / change-confirm / change-submit-btn, link-to-forgot-password on /login, nav-change-password in dashboard header).
Frontend: /change-password is correctly wrapped in ProtectedRoute — unauth users hit /login as expected.

Iteration_1 + iteration_2 regression is intact (4 stale assertions in test_backend.py that compared persisted email against original-case input were updated to .lower() — this is a test-script fix, not a product change; the product is now case-insensitive by design).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_backend.py (4 stale email-case assertions updated to compare against .lower(); product behaviour is now case-insensitive by design)

success_rate.backend: 100% (43/43 executed pass; 1 skip on /openapi.json from iter2 — unrelated)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (8/8 Playwright checks: forgot-password renders+submit, reset-password with token, reset-no-token state, /change-password unauth redirect, login forgot-password link, authed /change-password form, dashboard nav-change-password)

test_credentials: Tests register ephemeral TEST_<uuid>@example.com / TestPass123! users. Manual smoke account creation procedure unchanged (see /app/memory/test_credentials.md). RESEND_API_KEY intentionally empty — emails extracted from /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log via the documented console-fallback block.
seed_data_creation: None — every test creates its own ephemeral user; reset tokens consumed within the same test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml (43 pass, 1 skip expected). Reset tokens for password-reset flow are extracted from /var/log/supervisor/backend.err.log — search for 'reset-password?token='. The _extract_reset_token_from_log() helper in test_password_flows.py preferentially anchors on the target email block (split on the 'EMAIL (console fallback)' banner) and falls back to most-recent token. RESEND_API_KEY is intentionally empty by design — DO NOT flag. The pre-existing F541 lint warning in blockchain_listener.py:98 is also unchanged and not in scope.
rca of the issue: P0 case-insensitivity RCA confirmed fixed at three layers: (1) services/auth_service.py:_normalize_email() lowercases+strips on register/login/get_user_by_email; (2) routes/auth.py:register handles the previously-crashing None-tokens auto-login path with a clear 500; (3) scripts/normalise_user_emails.py one-shot migration backfilled existing 63 users + ensured a unique index on email. Confirmed end-to-end by registering 'Mario.Rossi.<uuid>@Example.COM' (200), then logging in with three different casings (all 200, all resolving to the same lowercased account). Welcome-email + password-reset-email console fallback both verified by tailing backend stderr for the 'EMAIL (console fallback)' banner.
